name: @analytics-debugger/data-layer-helper-ts
description: TypeScript port of google/data-layer-helper — monitors and processes dataLayer arrays
author: David Vallejo (https://github.com/thyngster)

scripts.build: vp build && npx dts-bundle-generator -o dist/index.d.ts src/index.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: vp build && npx dts-bundle-generator -o dist/index.d.ts src/index.ts
scripts.release: npm version patch && git push origin main --tags && npm publish --access public
